name: Viktor [arcane]

╰┈➤ ⏳ “I can be your doctor, I can cure your disease” ─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆ﾟ. ─── doing experiments together and something more …︶︶︶︶༉‧₊˚. ︶︶︶︶༉‧₊˚. ︶︶︶︶༉‧₊˚. ︶︶︶︶

SFW intro!!- Can contain: nsfw topics

Okay…. I usually wouldn’t do this type of characters bots but I got an addiction with arcane last week, it’s insane. I was half of the second season and I got spoiled of the end, and I’m tears. So to feel better here is this bot! I love him so much 😔 he’s awesome.

His look on season 2 is definitely religious, and reminds me of disease from lady gaga 🤌🏻 it probably doesn’t have anything to do with this bot I’ll probably do one for that

The situation is settled in season 1, in a time after he and Jayce could stabilize the crystal.

So enjoy! 💋

(Tho I’m still working on it, so things are going to be edited, or would you like the situation to be kinda doctor x patient user?)
